topics: Demonstrate cryptographic principles and applications, encryption techniques, message authentication codes, and symmetric and asymmetric cryptography
XOR operation demonstration on a character string
Bitwise AND and XOR operations with 127 on a character string

Course Outcomes: Perform encryption and decryption using various algorithms
Course Outcomes: Implement DES and AES algorithms
Course Outcomes: Analyse and implement Blowfish and RSA algorithm
